query:
INSERT INTO user_decrypt_req (
                ext_job_id,
                int_job_id,
                req
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
            ON CONFLICT (int_job_id)
            WHERE req_status NOT IN ('failure'::req_status, 'timed_out'::req_status)
            DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW() 
            RETURNING ext_job_id, (xmax = 0) AS "is_inserted!"
